function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_12__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice dated 2026-01-12 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record written successfully and passes verification checklist: recipient matches canonical entity email, attachment path was read, ordering requirement satisfied with single attachment, YAML subject safely quoted. Next required completion step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created durable outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md for Claudia with the requested 2026-01-12 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: next inbox message processed, outbound draft created, inbox item deleted.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the resend request workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by verifying sender identity (Claudia Reiter), locating the requested invoice dated 2026-01-12 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH, creating an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md`, and then deleting the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap sequence (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical metadata, matched sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox filename/schema, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: All required canonical evidence was present and consistent: inbox sender `claudia@helios-tax.example` matched `10_entities/cast/claudia.md` primary_contact_email; requested invoice matched exact issue date/counterparty in `50_finance/invoices/2026_01_12__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md`; outbound record was created in the mandated outbox path format with valid required fields and exact attachment path. No security trigger criteria were present.
